postReview.title: Portugal 2-1 Scotland: Ronaldo's late heroics seal comeback win
postReview.description: Cristiano Ronaldo came off the bench to ensure Portugal made it two wins from two in the Nations League with a 2-1 victory over Scotland.

preReview.title: Ronaldo's 900 goals 'an inspiration for football' – Martinez
preReview.description: Cristiano Ronaldo's milestone achievement of 900 career goals must be seen as an "inspiration for football", so says Roberto Martinez.
